product_results.title: Magnetic for iPhone 16 Pro Case with Camera Control Button, Compatible with MagSafe, [Full Camera Protection][Privacy Screen Protector] Non-Slip Translucent iPhone 16 Pro Phone Cover (Matte Black)

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be a good product with quality construction. The case fits perfectly and accommodates all chargers. Users appreciate its nice appearance and trendy design. The color, particularly the pink option, receives positive feedback from customers. The case provides good protection for phones. However, customers have varying experiences with the case's durability, grip, and magnetic strength features.

authors_reviews.title: Good case has camera button protection for iPhone 16
authors_reviews.text: One of better cases for iPhone 16 plus it actually has a button cover for the camera button that protects it.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Good combo
authors_reviews.text: A bit bulky but i love the max protection. The included screen protector is actually good when it come to clarity but somehow I cant get all edges to fully stick to the glass. Overall its a nice case and screen protector combo.
authors_reviews.author: Rolando P.

authors_reviews.title: Poor magnet glue application
authors_reviews.text: The glue started to come off after 2 month. It looked so nice too :(
authors_reviews.author: Jack R

authors_reviews.title: Great but needs better adhesive
authors_reviews.text: It’s a good product but the magnet adhevise seems to be loosening after a couple of months
authors_reviews.author: Multi-User
